message:
build: Configure Rust workspace with strict safety and lint settings

Establishes the Cargo workspace configuration for the wa (wezterm_automata)
project with two member crates: wa (CLI binary) and wa-core (library).

Workspace Settings:
- Rust Edition 2024 with resolver v2
- Minimum Rust version: 1.85 (nightly required for edition 2024)
- License: MIT
- Repository: github.com/Dicklesworthstone/wezterm_automata

Safety Configuration:
- unsafe_code = "forbid" - No unsafe Rust allowed anywhere in the workspace
- This is a critical requirement for a tool that automates terminal input
- Ensures memory safety guarantees for all automation operations

Lint Configuration (via workspace.lints):
- clippy::all, pedantic, nursery, cargo all enabled at warn level
- Priority-based configuration to avoid lint conflicts
- Selective allowances for stub code phase:
  * module_name_repetitions - common in Rust module patterns
  * missing_*_doc lints - documentation comes after implementation
  * unused_async, collection_is_never_read - stub code patterns
  * multiple_crate_versions - dependency consolidation is later phase

Core Dependencies:
- serde/serde_json 1.0 - JSON serialization for WezTerm CLI output
- tokio 1.43 (full) - Async runtime for concurrent pane monitoring
- thiserror 2.0 / anyhow 1.0 - Error handling ecosystem
- tracing 0.1 - Structured logging with span correlation
- clap 4.5 - CLI argument parsing with derive macros
- rusqlite 0.32 (bundled) - SQLite for persistent storage
- aho-corasick 1.1, memchr 2.7, fancy-regex 0.14 - Pattern matching

Release Profile:
- opt-level = "z" - Optimize for binary size
- lto = true - Link-time optimization for better dead code elimination
- codegen-units = 1 - Single unit for maximum optimization
- panic = "abort" - No unwinding overhead
- strip = true - Remove debug symbols

Toolchain:
- rust-toolchain.toml pins to nightly channel
- Includes rustfmt and clippy components

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,69 @@
+[workspace]
+resolver = "2"
+members = [
+    "crates/wa",
+    "crates/wa-core",
+]
+
+[workspace.package]
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+rust-version = "1.85"
+authors = ["Dicklesworthstone"]
+license = "MIT"
+repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/wezterm_automata"
+
+[workspace.lints.rust]
+unsafe_code = "forbid"
+
+[workspace.lints.clippy]
+# Use explicit priorities to avoid conflicts
+all = { level = "warn", priority = -1 }
+pedantic = { level = "warn", priority = -1 }
+nursery = { level = "warn", priority = -1 }
+cargo = { level = "warn", priority = -1 }
+
+# Allow some pedantic lints that are too strict for stubs
+module_name_repetitions = "allow"
+too_many_lines = "allow"
+missing_errors_doc = "allow"
+missing_panics_doc = "allow"
+missing_docs_in_private_items = "allow"
+doc_markdown = "allow"
+# Nursery lints that are too noisy for stub code
+unused_async = "allow"
+collection_is_never_read = "allow"
+missing_const_for_fn = "allow"
+# Cargo lints - we don't have full metadata yet
+multiple_crate_versions = "allow"
+
+[workspace.dependencies]
+# Core dependencies
+serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json = "1.0"
+tokio = { version = "1.43", features = ["full"] }
+thiserror = "2.0"
+anyhow = "1.0"
+tracing = "0.1"
+tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["env-filter"] }
+
+# CLI
+clap = { version = "4.5", features = ["derive", "env"] }
+
+# Database
+rusqlite = { version = "0.32", features = ["bundled", "backup", "functions"] }
+
+# Pattern matching
+aho-corasick = "1.1"
+memchr = "2.7"
+fancy-regex = "0.14"
+
+# Internal crates
+wa-core = { path = "crates/wa-core" }
+
+[profile.release]
+opt-level = "z"     # Optimize for size
+lto = true          # Link-time optimization
+codegen-units = 1   # Single codegen unit for better optimization
+panic = "abort"     # Smaller binary, no unwinding overhead
+strip = true        # Remove debug symbols
